title: Admit EDTS Visible Progress Release 1 as provisional interactive visual demonstrator
summary: Ship an interactive 3D demonstrator (Factory ICE / Deconstruction / EV Proposal) using procedural PLACEHOLDER_GEOMETRY scaled only to ASSERTION_EXTRACTED layout dimensions. Integrate Release 1 handoff architecture (badge color table, scene tree, evidence ledger, KG/MEPQ passport panel, decon retained/extracted visuals, EV proposal pack) while rejecting fabricated VERIFIED claims and invented kWh/kW/mass from the sample JSX. Does not authorize L10 public demo, procedure generation, or geometry freeze.
honesty_constraints: All meshes default PLACEHOLDER_GEOMETRY or DESIGN_PROPOSAL / BLOCKED
Layout dims only from SRC-CAND-000010 ASSERTION_EXTRACTED tokens
Factory vs EV proposal families visually and metadata-separated
MEPQ blockers and KG IDs surfaced in inspector — not papered over
Handoff sample VERIFIED frame/cab/axle, 110 kWh, 250 kW, 1,100 lb rejected
handoff_architecture_admitted: Component passport side panel schema (honest evidence ledger)
EV proposal pack markers (battery, EDU, inverter, DC-DC, LTR, CCS) without invented ratings
